mapper.select: SELECT r.reserveId, r.roomId, m.roomName, TO_CHAR(r.reserveDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS reserveDate, r.startTime, r.endTime, r.title, r.reserveEmpId, r.reserveEmpName, r.status FROM meetingReserve r JOIN meetingRoom m ON r.roomId = m.roomId WHERE TO_CHAR(r.reserveDate, 'YYYY-MM') = #{yearMonth} AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY r.reserveDate, r.startTime

SELECT r.reserveId, r.roomId, m.roomName, TO_CHAR(r.reserveDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS reserveDate, r.startTime, r.endTime, r.title, r.memo, r.attendees, r.reserveEmpId, r.reserveEmpName, r.reserveDeptName, r.status, TO_CHAR(r.regDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS regDate FROM meetingReserve r JOIN meetingRoom m ON r.roomId = m.roomId WHERE r.reserveId = #{reserveId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT meetingReserve_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO meetingReserve (reserveId, roomId, reserveDate, startTime, endTime, title, memo, attendees, reserveEmpId, reserveEmpName, reserveDeptName, status) SELECT #{reserveId}, #{roomId}, TO_DATE(#{reserveDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{title}, #{memo}, #{attendees}, #{reserveEmpId}, #{reserveEmpName}, #{reserveDeptName}, 'ACTIVE' FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM meetingReserve WHERE roomId = #{roomId} AND reserveDate = TO_DATE(#{reserveDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND startTime < #{endTime} AND endTime > #{startTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetingReserve WHERE reserveDate = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND reserveEmpId = #{empId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetingReserve WHERE reserveDate BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 6 AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND reserveEmpId = #{empId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetingReserve WHERE TO_CHAR(reserveDate, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM') AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND reserveEmpId = #{empId}
